metadata.name: Cast Iron
metadata.title: Cast Iron Laser Cleaning Settings
metadata.description: Detailed machine settings, parameter relationships, diagnostic procedures, and troubleshooting guides for optimizing cast iron laser cleaning operations.

author.name: Ikmanda Roswati
author.title: Ph.D.
author.jobTitle: Junior Research Scientist in Laser Physics
expertise: Ultrafast Laser Physics and Material Interactions
credentials: 2+ years in ultrafast laser research including ASEAN optics workshops

powerRange.description: Optimal average power for Cast Iron oxide removal without substrate damage

wavelength.description: Near-infrared wavelength optimized for Cast Iron absorption and rust removal

spotSize.description: Beam spot diameter for effective cleaning resolution

repetitionRate.description: Optimal repetition rate for continuous cleaning coverage

energyDensity.description: Fluence threshold for Cast Iron oxide removal

pulseWidth.description: Nanosecond pulse duration for efficient oxide layer ablation

scanSpeed.description: Optimal scanning speed for uniform cleaning coverage

passCount.description: Number of cleaning passes for complete oxide removal

overlapRatio.description: Optimal beam overlap for uniform surface treatment
